description: You are a planetary robotics engineer preparing a Webots simulation for validating a Mars rover's autonomous navigation software. The simulation world is loaded but uses placeholder Earth-default parameters. Update the environment and rover configuration to match Martian specifications: set the WorldInfo gravity to 3.72 and basicTimeStep to 16. Configure the MARS_ROVER 'nav_camera' resolution to 1024x768 and the robot's mass to 180.0 kg. Add ContactProperties to WorldInfo with a coulombFriction of 0.4. Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/mars_rover.wbt.
